# Overview

## Task list

* ~~Detection limits~~
* Inter-series variability
    - Quantify the variability
        - from variations in the signal measured or the oak reference sample
        - LA-ICPMS vs. HNO3 ICPOES (Caroline data) calibration equations.
    - test different methods of correction to minimise bias between sample series
* Establish a protocol to measure the actual resolution of LA-ICPMS: place markers on wood samples of know position and size
